parameters.source_item: Smallest bending radius (referred to hose axis)

source_refs.excerpt: Smallest bending radius (referred to hose axis)
Type 2 SN hoses from DN 6 to DN 8 (on the basis of DIN EN 853)
Type 4 SP hoses from DN 12 to DN 20 (on the basis of DIN EN 856)
(values in round brackets are acc. to DIN EN 856)
"Gelbring" (hose with yellow ring marks) with non-buckling steel spiral, acc. to TRbF 50, smooth inside and outside.
Temperature range -30°C to +90°C (momentarily up to 110°C). Electric resistance < 106 Ohm, according to DIN EN 12115
